description: SVG-based rotary knob. Features: ring of LED-style dots around the knob body (like Jupiter/Integra iPad app), orange/colored indicator line from min to current value, 3D gradient knob body, label above, value below. Props: value, min, max, defaultValue, label, onChange, formatValue, color, size (sm/lg). Replace current EqKnob. Large variant for prominent params (Cutoff, Resonance).
title: SynthKnob: rotary knob with LED arc indicator
